name: Daltonized Light
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Colorblind-safe light preset built on the daltonized base and the IBM colorblind-safe palette (deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia friendly). Derives every Claude Code token so success/error and other status colors stay distinguishable, and replaces the hardcoded white user-input highlight with a readable light surface.
